techniques.evidence_quote: a threat actor compromised one of the company's Amazon Web Services (AWS) accounts
The threat actor used the account to collect 9.5 million records from the company's AWS infrastructure
data that was eventually leaked online on a forum dedicated to trading hacked data
The threat actor used the account to collect 9.5 million records from the company's AWS infrastructure, data that was eventually leaked online

attack_chain.description: Threat actor compromised one of FlexBooker's AWS accounts, gaining unauthorized access to their cloud environment. The exact method of compromise is unknown.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: a threat actor compromised one of the company's Amazon Web Services (AWS) accounts

attack_chain.description: Using the compromised AWS account, the threat actor collected 9.5 million records from FlexBooker's AWS infrastructure, including names, email addresses, phone numbers, password hashes, and partial credit card data.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The threat actor used the account to collect 9.5 million records from the company's AWS infrastructure

attack_chain.description: The exfiltrated data containing 3.7 million unique user records was transferred out of the AWS environment and subsequently published on a data-trading forum.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: data that was eventually leaked online on a forum dedicated to trading hacked data

initial_access_vector: Compromised AWS account credentials — exact method (phishing, credential stuffing, exposed keys, etc.) not disclosed in source
